title: Skeleton
description: Foldkit-native shadcn base-nova Skeleton helper using cn.

examples.title: SkeletonCard
examples.description: Card loading placeholder using example-local Card shell classes.

examples.title: SkeletonDemo
examples.description: Default Skeleton avatar and text demo.

examples.title: SkeletonRtl
examples.description: RTL Skeleton layout example with local direction constants.

deviations.summary: Card example uses fixture-local static Card shell classes instead of an installable shadcn Card component.
deviations.rationale: This batch intentionally does not add shadcn/card as an installable registry item. The local Card shell preserves the origin DOM slots and base-nova classes used by the Skeleton Card example.

deviations.summary: RTL example uses local constants instead of the origin language-selector runtime dependency.
deviations.rationale: Installable source cannot depend on the origin app language selector. Local RTL constants preserve the default rendered direction while fixture aliases keep the origin evidence bundleable.
